code: export class NameIconEquippedParser{constructor(){this._userId=0;this._iconId=0;this._iconKey='';}flush(){this._userId=0;this._iconId=0;this._iconKey='';return true;}parse(wrapper){this._userId=wrapper.readInt();this._iconId=wrapper.readInt();this._iconKey=wrapper.readString();return true;}get userId(){return this._userId;}get iconId(){return this._iconId;}get iconKey(){return this._iconKey;}}
